idea-plugin.name: The Matrix
idea-plugin.description:
A dark IntelliJ theme inspired by The Matrix.

The theme brings a cinematic black-and-phosphor-green palette to the IDE with Matrix-style editor colours, darker UI surfaces, glowing green accents, and a custom plugin icon designed to match the movie's visual identity.

Built for developers who want their editor to feel like a terminal inside the Matrix.
idea-plugin.change-notes: Improved the colour contrast for functions, class names and operators
